hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) command -v eslint >/dev/null 2>&1 && eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 || (command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1) || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix "$f" && ruff format "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "Reminder: uncommitted changes present — if code changed this turn, run the project's own checks (tests / build / lint, or its validate script) and show the output before declaring it done." >&2; exit 0
